personal.name: Akshay Pawar
personal.tagline: Senior software engineer focused on enterprise applications, delivery leadership, and scalable .NET and Angular solutions.
personal.summary: In my 7+ years of software engineering, I've evolved from an intern to a seasoned professional, specializing in team leadership and domain-driven project delivery.

highlights: Specialized in C#, JavaScript, Angular, .NET Core, ASP.NET, and database-driven application delivery.
Experienced in enterprise portal development, merchant services, legacy system integration, and CI/CD modernization.
Collaborative engineer with a strong record of cross-functional delivery, architecture discussions, and production support.

AI: TODO: No AI-specific skills were listed in the provided resume.

responsibilities: Spearhead the development and maintenance of enterprise-grade merchant service portals using .NET Core and Angular.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to analyze requirements and deliver secure, scalable, and high-performance solutions.
Participate in architecture discussions, code reviews, and agile ceremonies to ensure timely and quality delivery.
Troubleshoot production issues and implement enhancements aligned with business goals.
Played a pivotal role in the Equities and Warrants Development Team, ensuring seamless integration of legacy systems.
Implemented modern CI/CD practices and streamlined software delivery using TeamCity and uDeploy.
Adhered to agile methodologies for efficient development processes.
Contributed to diverse projects across finance, media, and cutting-edge technologies, including implementations with Angular and Azure.
Demonstrated adaptability and innovation in projects like SMAI, leveraging advanced technologies for efficient data processing.
Led pivotal projects like Croptech and MyBenefits360 in the insurance domain, overseeing end-to-end development.
Collaborated closely with cross-functional teams and managed client relationships, ensuring seamless integration and successful onboarding of prestigious clients.
